channel.title: Comments on: Hoptober Golden Ale, New Belgium Brewing – Ep. 80
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: John of StogieBrew
item.dc:creator: John of StogieBrew
item.description: Nice video, great review. I need to try this stuff after watching this!
item.content:encoded: Nice video, great review. I need to try this stuff after watching this!

item.title: By: Doc Holloway, QA Member
item.dc:creator: Doc Holloway, QA Member
item.description: Pink. I must admit your camera presence is better than watching from the bar, The Hoptoberfest has been my favorite while on tap. Thanks for the clear description of its qualities by ingredients.SUADYB.
item.content:encoded: Pink. I must admit your camera presence is better than watching from the bar, The Hoptoberfest has been my favorite while on tap. Thanks for the clear description of its qualities by ingredients.SUADYB.

item.title: By: Travis
item.dc:creator: Travis
item.description: mmmm, I just recently tried Hoptober for the first time a few weeks back. Although given the name, Hotpober, I was a bit saddened that it didn't have more hops to it.
item.content:encoded: mmmm, I just recently tried Hoptober for the first time a few weeks back. Although given the name, Hotpober, I was a bit saddened that it didn’t have more hops to it.

item.title: By: Marco Baio
item.dc:creator: Marco Baio
item.description: That's it, I can't get Hoptober here so I'm going to have to go out and get an IPA after seeing this show.
item.content:encoded: That’s it, I can’t get Hoptober here so I’m going to have to go out and get an IPA after seeing this show.
